creator: LoN_Kamikaze@gmx.de
text:
After updating to Releng_6 yesterday (base and kernel) from a previous
post 6.2 Releng_6 no /dev/psm0 device is detected on my Thinkpad R40,
with a synaptics touchpad. There are no error messages, nothing in dmesg,
it's just as if it wasn't there.

Falling back to a Releng_6_2 kernel it works fine.

Please request any information from me that might help detect the problem.
